name: Edge: no alternatives + delay bounded within cover (default wait)
rubric_notes: Sole-source SKU but with comfortable cover (360h) and bounded delay (72h). 'No alternatives' is not a catastrophic state when there's nothing to act on — the rubric's no-alt edge case is asymmetric (only matters when delay > cover). This scenario tests that the system doesn't conflate 'sole-source' with 'must engage spot market.' Reliable primary supplier (LOW uncertainty + 0.91 reliability) further argues against premature action. No customer at risk. Severity LOW; confidence HIGH.
